info.title: TomoToolNX
info.author: miiazertyy
info.description: Tools for Tomodachi life ltd directly on Switch
info.details: Browse, preview, import and export textures either through a web browser on any device on the same network, or directly on the console. Automatically backs up your save before making any changes.

changelog:
v1.2.4
Importing now supports every ugc files
Touch screen now works in the belonging and habits tab
Updater fixed
Bug fixes

v1.2.3
Added U-2-Netp: https://huggingface.co/BritishWerewolf/U-2-Netp ai to remove background of ugcs easily (+5mo sorry)
Thumb is now written automatically
Touch screen fixes
New Habits tab
Qol UI additions

v1.2.2
Subtabs are now implemented in the WebUI
Now shows a prompt when running applet mode because of the "Error - User not found" confusion
Added ability to change encounter dates in the relation tab
Backup now saves up to 8 saves by default so there's less chances of overwriting an incorrect backup.
Added a belongings tab
ShareMii: https://github.com/Star-F0rce/ShareMii version v3.2.3 fixes implemented
Better UI logic and bug fixes

v1.2.1
SO MUCH UI and WebUI bug fixes, better logic and additions
Added more editing features in mii stats and player tabs

v1.2.0
added save editing features for player file and miis
qol changes and bug fixes

v1.1.6
added touch screen support
added the ability to choose the export path
exporting now shows the path where its importing
